hardConstraint.mandateText: ALL trades MUST use EXACTLY 1:10 leverage. No more, no less.

withoutKillSwitch.note: FundingCarryTimingStrategy hides rebalanceCount/rebalanceCostUsd in its private underlyingCarry; null is the safe-fallback sentinel here.

risk.layer3: N/A for defensive plugin (RiskSignals only, no SizingSignals)
